headlines.title: Gandalf, Picasso and MLK: Cultural references ground Pope Leo’s AI warning
headlines.description: It took a little over a year for Pope Leo XIV to write more than 42,000 words of his first encyclical, which deals with the safeguarding of human dignity in the age of artificial intelligence.

headlines.title: China’s Huawei touts chip design breakthrough in bid to defy U.S. sanctions
headlines.description: Chinese tech giant Huawei said it had achieved a breakthrough that would allow it to make cutting-edge chips within five years, touting the news as a milestone in Beijing’s effort to circumvent U.S. technology restrictions.

headlines.title: Pope Leo warns AI is fueling conflict, urges world to slow advances
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV has called for AI advances to be slowed and blamed the technology for fueling conflict around the world.

headlines.title: Pope Leo will take on AI alongside an Anthropic co-founder
headlines.description: Pope Leo XIV is set to release a landmark encyclical Monday focused on preserving human dignity in the face of AI

headlines.title: Trump abruptly scraps signing of landmark executive order regulating AI
headlines.description: President Donald Trump scrapped an executive order signing Thursday. The order is expected to lay out partnerships with leading AI companies to vet new models.

headlines.title: Patrick Stewart, AI and I encountered the Bard. Resistance was futile.
headlines.description: My journey through Shakespeare was guided by “Star Trek” star Patrick Stewart, who just recorded a new audiobook of the sonnets, and Claude AI.

headlines.title: New details on potential deal to end Iran war
headlines.description: There are new questions over how close the US is to a deal that would end the war with Iran. President Trump, who is working to open the Strait of Hormuz, says the negotiations are proceeding nicely - but Iran is sending a different message. NBC News’ Garrett Haake has the story.

headlines.title: Rubio tours India’s famed Taj Mahal amid strained trade relations
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio toured India’s famed Taj Mahal during a four-day visit at a critical time for U.S.-India relations. After bilateral talks with India’s external affairs minister, Rubio expressed optimism about future trade ties between the two countries, which were strained by President Trump’s tariff policies.

headlines.title: Federal court blocks Alabama from using redistricting map
headlines.description: A panel of federal judges blocked Alabama from using a GOP-drawn congressional map that would eliminate one of the state’s majority-Black districts. NBC News’ Gary Grumbach reports on how the case could soon be decided by the Supreme Court.

headlines.title: Pope Leo issues new warning on artificial intelligence
headlines.description: Pope Leo is making history by wading into the AI debate, warning that people need to be a part of developing the new technology, however it unfolds. NBC News’ Anne Thompson has the story.

headlines.title: Robotic exoskeletons promise easier hikes and high-tech workouts
headlines.description: Wearable exoskeletons promise to boost endurance on hikes and workouts. NBC News' Ryan Chandler explores whether the high-tech gear is the future of fitness - or just a fad.

headlines.title: How 'Age Tech' might help you grow old at home and with more ease
headlines.description: It can be hard for older adults to live independently if they don’t have a caregiver or anyone close by to help them out. Now, there’s technology that can help older adults broaden their options, make their homes safer and ease caregivers’ minds.
